messages.content: how do i say good morning in Altai
In the Altai language, "good morning" is typically expressed as "ьс байырашы!" (üs bayıraşı!).
how do i say get on your horse in Altai
In Altai, you can say "аңып алырға!" (ańıp alyrğa!) to mean "get on your horse."
in Khakas
In Khakas, you can say "мурдаш батыр!" (murdash batır!) to mean "get on your horse."
in Chulym
In Chulym, you can say "ӱва катаай!" (üwa kataay!) to mean "get on your horse."
in Southern Altai
In Southern Altai, you can say "айла дыңкыларыңа йыт!" (ayla dıŋkılarıŋa yıt!) to mean "get on your horse."
in Megrelian
I apologize, but I'm unable to provide a translation in Megrelian as it is not currently supported by the system.
in Lazuri
In the Lazuri language, you can say "gezeze getsokat!" to mean "get on your horse."
how do i say what's wrong with you in Lazuri
In Lazuri, you can say "nucae kavişiye?" to mean "what's wrong with you?"
how do i say son of the Laz people in Lazuri
In Lazuri, you can say "Me Lazur aderca" to mean "Son of the Laz people."
how do i say now tell me, where are the georgians? in Lazuri
In Lazuri, you can say "Şuşa asbateyz, rayıtorduroğ," to mean "Now tell me, where are the Georgians?"
in Abkhaz
In Abkhaz, you can say "Амәхәӡыԥшьыра иар цыра тоу?" (Aməhəjhıpşyra yar tsyra tou?) to mean "Now tell me, where are the Georgians?"
in Gagauz
In Gagauz, you can say "Söyle şimdi, Gürcüler nerede?" to mean "Now tell me, where are the Georgians?"
in Mazandarani
In Mazandarani, you can say "الان بم بگو، جورجی‌هاکو کجن؟" (Ālān bam begu, ĵurjihāku kajan?) to mean "Now tell me, where are the Georgians?"
in Farsi
In Farsi, you can say "الان بهم بگو، گرجی‌ها کجا هستند؟" (Ālān beham begu, gorjihā kojā hastand?) to mean "Now tell me, where are the Georgians?"
how do i say what's wrong with u in Mazandarani
In Mazandarani, you can say "شاه هر پاشت توئری؟" (Şāh har pāşt turī?) to mean "What's wrong with you?"
in Farsi
In Farsi, you can say "چه مشکلی داری؟" (Che moshkeli dari?) to mean "What's wrong with you?"
in Southern Luri
In Southern Luri, you can say "توو ده‌ناوتان کجایه ؟" (Tūw denāvatān kajāye?) to mean "What's wrong with you?"
how do i say nomad in Mazandarani
In Mazandarani, the word for "nomad" is "طوایی" (tavāyi).
in farsi
In Farsi, the word for "nomad" is "کوچنده" (kuçande).
in Southern Luri
In Southern Luri, the word for "nomad" is "کچند" (کچنه) (kuchand/kuchane).
in Northern Luri
In Northern Luri, the word for "nomad" is "کنجه" (kanje).
